sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106483" key="u(dro/xaris" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδρό-χᾰρις</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106483.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Grace of the waters,</tr_> name of a frog, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:227" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">227</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
